recipe.title: Monday: Korean Ground Beef over Sesame Rice
ingredients: To serve: sesame rice, sliced scallions, sesame seeds, quick-pickled cucumbers
steps: Make quick-pickled cucumbers: slice 1 cucumber thin, toss with 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp sugar, pinch of salt. Set aside.
Brown ground beef in large skillet over high heat, breaking up as it cooks. Drain excess fat.
Add garlic and ginger to beef, cook 1 min until fragrant.
Stir in soy sauce, brown sugar, sesame oil, gochujang, tomato paste, rice vinegar. Simmer 5 min until sauce thickens and coats the beef.
Serve over sesame rice (cook jasmine rice with 1 tsp sesame oil stirred in). Top with scallions, sesame seeds, pickled cucumbers.
